TRIAL OFF CALENDAR, NO ANSWER OR FIRST APPEARANCE FEES ON PART OF DEFT.

BOTH PARTIES APPEARED FOR TRIAL, BUT CASE WAS SET FOR TRIAL IN ERROR (DEFT. NEVER FILED A FIRST APPEARANCE PAPER OR FILING FEES) CASE REMOVED FROM THE CIVIL ACTIVE LIST UNTIL DEFT. APPEARS AND PAYS FILING FEES OR APPLIES FOR WAIVER OF FEES; WHEN DEFT. HAS COMPLIED, DEFT. WILL TURN IN A MEMO TO SET FOR TRIAL.
